items.definition_en: An avatar is the character you play as in a video game.
items.example_en: I changed my avatar to look like a superhero.

items.definition_en: A controller is the device you use to play video games.
items.example_en: My controller stopped working during the game.

items.definition_en: A console is a machine for playing video games.
items.example_en: We got a new console for Christmas.

items.definition_en: A level is a section or part of a video game.
items.example_en: I finally finished the last level last night.

items.definition_en: A mission is a task you must complete in a game.
items.example_en: I completed the secret mission yesterday.

items.definition_en: A quest is an adventure or task given to the player.
items.example_en: I went on a long quest to find the treasure.

items.definition_en: A boss is a strong enemy you must defeat in a game.
items.example_en: The final boss was very hard to beat.

items.definition_en: A score is the number of points you get in a game.
items.example_en: My high score is over 10,000 points.

items.definition_en: A team is a group that plays together.
items.example_en: Our team won the match in the game.

items.definition_en: A match is a game played between two or more people or teams.
items.example_en: We joined a match with friends online.

items.definition_en: An enemy is someone or something you fight against in a game.
items.example_en: An enemy appeared on the screen.

items.definition_en: A quest item is something you must find or collect during a quest.
items.example_en: I need this quest item to finish the mission.

items.definition_en: A leaderboard is a list showing the best players in a game.
items.example_en: I reached the top of the leaderboard.

items.definition_en: Multiplayer is a mode where many people play together.
items.example_en: We played in multiplayer and had fun as a group.

items.definition_en: A power-up gives you special abilities or extra points in a game.
items.example_en: I found a power-up that made me faster.

items.definition_en: A save is a record of your progress in a game.
items.example_en: I loaded my last save after losing the match.

items.definition_en: A life is a chance to keep playing after losing in a game.
items.example_en: You get an extra life after 1000 points.

items.definition_en: A skin is a new look for your character in a video game.
items.example_en: I won a special skin for my character.

items.definition_en: A coin is a small item you collect in games for points or rewards.
items.example_en: I picked up many coins during the level.

items.definition_en: A pause is a break that stops the game for a moment.
items.example_en: Let's take a pause before the next game round.
